methodology.purpose: Planning classification only; an entry does not claim that proof exists or currently passes.
methodology.dominant_layer: One coordinating lane per parent case for workload planning. A case may require additional layers listed in recommended_layers.

dispositions.automatable: All catalog obligations are expected to be machine-provable with deterministic fixtures.
dispositions.hybrid: Deterministic automation should be paired with external-service, platform, artifact, privacy, or human-observation evidence.
dispositions.manual: Exploratory or physical-hardware evidence is the primary proof and automation can only assist.
dispositions.blocked: The catalog marks product behavior as a known gap; implementation is required before passing proof can exist.

methodology.live_policy: Every test environment uses synthetic assets explicitly released as CC0 or verified public-domain content. LIVE behavior adds deterministic fake-upstream or API proof plus a separately recorded disposable-account or real-device canary; household libraries and unlicensed media are prohibited.
methodology.completion_rule: A parent is complete only when every clause and applicable vector has proof; dominant_layer alone never establishes completion.

cases.classification_note: Use deterministic fake-upstream/API proof plus a separately recorded disposable-account or real-device canary; automation does not eliminate the external obligation.
